meta.load_condition: Load when user intent includes a concrete production situation, implementation target, failure symptom, or review request.

scenarios.trigger: User asks for a website hero animation.
scenarios.orientation: Start with a single visual anchor, reveal copy after visual stability, keep background motion below attention threshold.

scenarios.trigger: User asks for a 3-second hook animation.
scenarios.orientation: Create immediate contrast, one primary motion beat, and a hold before secondary information.

scenarios.trigger: User asks for high-end, luxury, professional, or premium feel.
scenarios.orientation: Use fewer moving parts, slower acceleration, stronger spacing, and longer holds.
